description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-split-button

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-split-button/`
**NOTE:** No index.ts — may be incomplete/from PR 175 rescue.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Existence Check** — Complete implementation? Document gaps.
2. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Primary action, dropdown trigger, divider. Dark mode.
3. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Button group pattern. Dropdown menu accessible. aria-haspopup.
4. **Functionality** — Primary action click. Dropdown with alternatives. Menu positioning. Disabled state.
5. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
6. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Button + trigger seamless styling. CSS Parts.
7. **CEM Accuracy** — Must be documented if shipping.
8. **Tests** — Primary click. Dropdown. Keyboard. Menu items.
9. **Storybook** — Default. With menu items. Disabled. Variants.
10. **Drupal Compatibility** — Operations dropdown. Twig-friendly.

### Deliverable
If incomplete: document gaps. If complete: full audit. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-split-button
